title: Rating performance of Suppliers
excerpt: We have created a project board to track project information and as part of the data we want to collect supplier performance data. We have used the ‘rating’ column with 5 stars and the principle works well, however the i…

posts.author: Leigh_73 (Leigh Skilton)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have created a project board to track project information and as part of the data we want to collect supplier performance data. We have used the ‘rating’ column with 5 stars and the principle works well, however the issue comes when trying to collect the data across multiple projects and aggregate a score as the rating feature articles all suggest to use it as a task prioritisation function and not for the purpose we have used it.

For example there is a Project X where Supplier A gets a performance rating of 5, on Project Y there performance rating is 3. Therefore the average score is 4.

How can we collect the data across all projects (likely on a high level and seperate dashboard/overview) to show that the average score is 4 in this instance?

Is there a better approach/way of achieving this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Leigh,

You bring up a good point! Can I ask if you could implement our formula column to pull that data? Check out my example below and let me know
